type_definitions.name: GitDiffGetter
type_definitions.description: Infrastructure adapter implementing the DiffGetter usecase port via git CLI. Pre-existing adapter — not modified by this track. Referenced here to document that GitDiffGetter is the concrete implementation wired into ScopeQueryInteractor at the CLI composition root. The list_diff_files method computes the 4-source union (merge-base diff, staged, unstaged, untracked) and returns Vec<FilePath>. ScopeQueryInteractor depends on the DiffGetter trait (CN-06); GitDiffGetter is the only implementation in infrastructure. No new infrastructure types are added by this track: the wiring is a CLI composition concern (apps/cli which has tddd.enabled=false).
